title: Iterative cycles 1-4: FNO_large fixes the 2015-2019 failure

FNO_large_walk_forward.note: FNO_large (8 modes, 32 width, 3 layers) is positive in 4/4 walk-forward windows. FNO_small was -0.251 in 2015-2019. The larger architecture generalizes across all regimes.

FNO_large_multi_asset.note: FNO_large is positive on all 8 assets. International (EWJ, EFA, GLD) generalization works.

GARCH_adversarial.note: FNO_large is positive on GARCH while cascade is negative. Different sign suggests FNO learns something different. More investigation needed.

remaining_issues: GARCH adversarial: FNO_large +0.29 on GARCH is unexpected. Is it genuine vol-of-vol signal or another artifact?
XLE: FNO vol-targeting loses -27% to B&H because energy rallied in 2025. Regime-specific issue.
GLD: FNO loses -5% because gold went up a lot in 2025.
International generalization: EWJ and EFA show weak FNO_large results (0.059, 0.200). May need different parameters for international markets.
interpretation: FNO_large is the new best model: positive Spearman in 4/4 walk-forward windows (median 0.30) and all 8 assets. The larger architecture (8 modes, 32 width, 3 layers) generalizes across regimes (calm pre-COVID, COVID, recovery, 2025 tariff) and asset classes (US sectors + international). OOS backtest on SPY gives +22% Sharpe improvement, on XLK +37%.
